title: Godavari Pushkaralu To Be Held Akin To Kumbh Mela Grandiosity: Anam
description: Launching the development works relating to the Pushkaralu in Rajamahendravaram, Anam said that all facilities would be provided at ghats stretching for 212 km in the twin Godavari districts. With Rs 750 crore financial assistance from the TTD and Sri Vani Trust, over 5,000 Bhajan mandirs would be constructed across the state
